title: User Goals
description: Daily nutrition targets per user, versioned by effective date. Each row represents the set of goals that was active for a given user starting on effective_date. To look up the goals that applied on any historical log_date, find the row with the most recent effective_date that is <= log_date. This design replaces the hardcoded goal values embedded in the Excel Dashboard.

user_id.description: FK to users table. Use 'default' for single-user deployments. Must match the user_id used in meal_log.

effective_date.description: The date from which this goal set becomes active. ISO 8601 date format YYYY-MM-DD. The active goal for any log_date is the row with the highest effective_date that is <= log_date. The combination of (user_id, effective_date) must be unique.

calories.description: Daily calorie target in kcal. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 4000.

total_fat.description: Daily total fat target in grams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 200.

total_carbs.description: Daily total carbohydrate target in grams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 400.

protein.description: Daily protein target in grams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 250.

sodium.description: Daily sodium target in milligrams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 4000.

potassium.description: Daily potassium target in milligrams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 4700.

dietary_fiber.description: Daily dietary fiber target in grams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 45.

sugars.description: Daily sugars target in grams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 80. Note: this is a ceiling (stay under), not a floor.

vitamin_a_mcg_rae.description: Daily Vitamin A target in mcg RAE. Canonical unit. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 900.

vitamin_c_mg.description: Daily Vitamin C target in milligrams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 500.

vitamin_d_mcg.description: Daily Vitamin D target in micrograms (mcg). Canonical unit. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 50 mcg (= 2000 IU).

calcium_mg.description: Daily calcium target in milligrams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 1200.

iron_mg.description: Daily iron target in milligrams. Source: Dashboard hardcoded value = 15.

calorie_meal_split.description: Strategy for distributing the daily calorie goal across meal types. Controls per-meal goal calculations on the dashboard. 'equal_three' replicates the Excel behaviour (calories / 3 distributed equally to Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner; Snack receives no goal). Future values may support custom per-meal targets.

notes.description: Optional free-text note describing why goals changed (e.g. 'adjusted for cut phase', 'post-bloodwork update'). Audit trail only — not used in calculations.
examples: Initial goals migrated from Excel workbook

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this goal record was created. Immutable after insert.
